security.role: Security review, secrets audit, access control, incident response

legal.role: Australian law compliance, platform T&Cs, IP/copyright, privacy

qa.role: Quality review, veracity (>=2 sources), Definition of Done enforcement

research.role: AI research, competitive intel, technical analysis

infra.role: ITIL/ITSM/AIOps + CI Continuous Improvement — backup/DR, auto-heal, SLA, asset management, release monitoring, fallback chain, cost/burn tracking, observability, allowlist sync, CI Cycle A/B evaluation, model benchmarking. systemEvent crons (health, obs, task monitor, mission control) are logically owned by Forge but technically bound to main (platform constraint).
infra.cadence: Ops: 5-min to hourly | Cost: daily | CI: every 6h | SLA: monthly | Assets: weekly/quarterly | Releases: daily
infra.notes: Activated 2026-05-03 by Ken. Owns fallback chain validation (35c8cd08) and CI Cycle A (3ec512f3). Previously ephemeral under main agentId. CHG-0147.

marketing.role: Campaigns, email marketing, lead gen, funnels

spark.role: Social & Digital Marketing Agent — all platforms, strategy, campaigns, content, and execution (Ken personal + AInchors brand)
spark.notes: Replaces planned Social (full API) agent slot. Scope expanded 2026-05-03 by Ken.
